positive: A stylized, symmetrical design of a minimalist forest landscape at dawn. The central elements are stylized, sharply rendered silhouettes of tall, slender pine trees and graceful wildflowers. The style should be a modern linocut or woodblock print aesthetic, featuring strong, solid black ink against a clean, vibrant background of muted teal, mustard yellow, and cream. The composition must be centered and highly graphic, suitable for printing on fabric. Focus on clean edges, high contrast, and negative space. The overall mood is serene and earthy. Golden hour light shafts subtly illuminate the foreground silhouettes.
